output.final_deliverable:
Extracted facts (from provided visit results):

1) Exact H1 text from https://example.com
   - H1 text: "Example Domain"
   - Source (citation): https://example.com

2) Exact domain of the external link from https://example.com
   - External link full URL: https://iana.org/domains/example
   - Exact domain (host) extracted: iana.org
   - Source (citation): https://example.com

3) One URL citation for each visited page
   - https://example.com
   - https://www.iana.org/domains/reserved

Verification note (from visit results): the visited IANA page H1 is "IANA-managed Reserved Domains" (source: https://www.iana.org/domains/reserved).
output.action_summary: I visited the two pages and extracted the requested items using the provided visit results. From https://example.com the H1 is "Example Domain" and the single external link found is https://iana.org/domains/example (domain: iana.org). The two page citations returned are https://example.com and https://www.iana.org/domains/reserved. All values above are taken directly from the supplied visit results.

merged_results.title: Consolidate visit results and produce final answers

result.title: Consolidate visit results and produce final answers

details.intent: After the two visit nodes complete, merge and format the outputs into the final deliverable containing: (1) the exact H1 text from example.com, (2) the exact domain of the external link from example.com, and (3) one URL citation for each visited page. Also include brief verification notes tying each returned value to the source page.
details.input_requirements: Requires outputs from the two visit nodes: example.com's exact_h1_text, external_link_url, external_link_domain, example.com page_citation; IANA page_citation and h1_or_title.
details.verification_steps: 1) Ensure exact_h1_text matches the H1 extracted from the example.com visit result. 2) Ensure example_external_link_domain is the host portion of the external_link_url extracted from the example.com visit. 3) Ensure both citations are the exact visited URLs.
details.rationale: This consolidation step ensures results are consistent, well-formatted, and that each returned fact is traceable back to a visited URL. A think node is used because it depends on the outputs of both visit nodes.
details.notes: This node does not perform new web requests; it synthesizes and formats the visited data for final delivery.
details.goal: Consolidate visit results and produce final answers
details.original_goal: Consolidate visit results and produce final answers
details.parent_goal: Visit https://example.com and https://www.iana.org/domains/reserved. Return: (1) the exact H1 text from example.com, (2) the exact domain of the external link from example.com, and (3) one URL citation for each visited page.

result.thinking_content: Consolidate visit results and produce final answers

e55b2329-4e54-4be6-82e0-63212adcba78.title: Visit https://example.com and extract H1, external link, and page citation

details.intent: Fetch the full page for https://example.com and extract (A) the exact H1 text, (B) the exact external link URL(s) present on the page and their domain(s), and (C) supply the page's URL as a citation.
target_facts: exact_h1_text: string (the content of the first H1 element, exact punctuation/case)
external_link_url: string (the exact href of the external link found on the page; if multiple, return first listed)
external_link_domain: string (the domain portion of external_link_url)
page_citation: string (the exact visited URL to cite: https://example.com)
details.extraction_plan: 1) Load the page at https://example.com. 2) Parse and extract the exact text of the first H1 element (preserve whitespace/punctuation). 3) Find anchor elements (<a>) whose href points to a different domain than example.com; select the first such external link. 4) Record the exact href string (do not modify) and extract its domain (host component). 5) Return the source page URL as the citation.
details.verification_steps: Confirm the H1 extraction by checking the page's HTML; confirm the external link href is present verbatim in the page; confirm the external link domain is the host portion of that exact href.
details.rationale: This visit node directly collects the three requested pieces of evidence from example.com. Visiting the exact URL ensures we capture the authoritative page content and an exact URL citation for that page.
details.notes: Vector DB will be queried automatically for related stored links. Follow the Visit Action Requirements: copy exact URLs from the page; do not guess or construct URLs.
details.goal: Visit https://example.com and extract H1, external link, and page citation
details.original_goal: Visit https://example.com and extract H1, external link, and page citation
details.parent_goal: Visit https://example.com and https://www.iana.org/domains/reserved. Return: (1) the exact H1 text from example.com, (2) the exact domain of the external link from example.com, and (3) one URL citation for each visited page.

action_result.intent: Fetch the full page for https://example.com and extract (A) the exact H1 text, (B) the exact external link URL(s) present on the page and their domain(s), and (C) supply the page's URL as a citation.
action_result.content_with_links:
https://iana.org/domains/example

8dcd4ce6-4022-4320-b6e6-d05199b1954e.title: Visit https://www.iana.org/domains/reserved and capture a URL citation (and H1 for verification)

details.intent: Fetch the full page for https://www.iana.org/domains/reserved and return one URL citation for the visited page. Also extract the page's H1 (or title) as verification evidence that the correct page was visited.
target_facts: page_citation: string (the exact visited URL to cite: https://www.iana.org/domains/reserved)
h1_or_title: string (the page H1 or title text to verify the page identity)
details.extraction_plan: 1) Load https://www.iana.org/domains/reserved. 2) Extract the first H1 element text; if no H1 present, extract the HTML <title>. 3) Return the visited URL as the citation and the H1/title as verification evidence.
details.verification_steps: Ensure the returned H1/title matches the page content; confirm the exact visited URL is provided verbatim as the citation.
details.rationale: The user requested a URL citation for the IANA reserved page. Visiting the exact URL provides definitive evidence and extracting H1/title gives easy verification that the correct resource was fetched.
details.notes: Vector DB will be queried automatically for stored links. Use the exact provided URL when visiting.
details.goal: Visit https://www.iana.org/domains/reserved and capture a URL citation (and H1 for verification)
details.original_goal: Visit https://www.iana.org/domains/reserved and capture a URL citation (and H1 for verification)
